title: euaraliopsis hispida
intro: Euaraliopsis hispida, also known as the spiny euphorbia, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. Euaraliopsis hispida can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, or topical creams to utilize its medicinal properties.
